case_title: JON J DEL BINO JR VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ET AL

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF MAY-15-2019 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

MEMORANDUM OF POINTS AND AUTHORITIES IN SUPPORT OF DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT; *COURT REPORTER FEES PAID* (TRANSACTION ID # 62784368) (TRANSACTION ID # 62784368) FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S DEMURRER TO THE COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. Off Calendar Jan-30-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT.

Defendant City and County of San Francisco's demurrer to the complaint is sustained without leave to amend. No opposition filed.

Order is signed.
